title: Trash Can (Fabric)
description: This mod adds a craftable Trash Can
body:
# About

Tired of burning your items in lava?

This mod adds a craftable **Trash Can**.

Just insert your items and they will disappear immediately.

**Hoppers and any type of item transportation pipe (even from other mods) can insert items into the trash can.**

Requires [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

**Made only to fabric**

Install this mod both on Client and Server to work

Download the most <u>*recent version*</u> so you don't have any bugs in your game

<hr>




If you want me to port this mod to a specific version of minecraft just leave a comment :)  

Feel free to use this mod in your modpack
